name: wa-court-docs
description: Draft and format pleadings, declarations, motions, notes for motion docket, and proposed orders for Washington courts. Applies GR 14 formatting; includes KCDC specifics; supports pro se workflows. Architected as matter-neutral civil-procedure skills (civil rules, evidence rules, fees and costs, local rules, citation format, online sources, discovery, first-30-days response, hearings, filing packets, post-judgment, fact-checking, deadlines) plus subject-matter bundles that plug into the procedural skills. The first subject-matter bundle, wa-consumer-debt, covers FDCPA, Reg F, RCW 19.16, the Washington CPA, chain-of-title doctrine, fact-pattern triage, and synthetic example filings for debt-buyer defense. The architecture leaves clean slots for future bundles (landlord-tenant, family, personal injury, etc.). All workflows are skills (no slash commands) so the agent invokes them automatically from natural-language requests.
